features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
ESSENTIAL SKIN CARE: Nuage Aqueous Cream is essential to any home. The hydrating capability along with the light, non-greasy formulation helps dry skin all year round.
GENTLE: Dermatologically tested, lanolin free and fragrance free. The aqueous cream is effectively ointment and water combined to produce a moisturiser for everyone to use.
SKIN COMFORT: Nuage Aqueous Cream is a non-greasy moisturiser. Perfect for treating very dry skin; particularly dermatitis, eczema, chapped sore skin especially during winter months
LIPS & SKIN: Suitable for use on the body and to treat and prevent dry chapped lips
description: Product Description Nuage Aqueous Cream is essential to any home. The hydrating capability along with the light, non-greasy formulation helps dry skin all year round. Dermatologically tested, lanolin free and fragrance free. The aqueous cream is effectively ointment and water combined to produce a moisturiser for everyone to use. Nuage Aqueous Cream is a non-greasy moisturiser. Perfect for treating very dry skin; particularly dermatitis, eczema, chapped sore skin especially during winter months. Suitable for use on the body and to treat and prevent dry chapped lips. Nuage is a trusted popular brand, search amazon.co.uk to view other available products. Contains 350ml. Ingredients Aqua, Petrolatum, Cetearyl Alcohol, Parraffinum Liquidum, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Phenoxyethanol. Directions Apply a small amount of NUAGE® Aqueous Cream to the affected areas of the skin and massage gently. Use as needed throughout the day. Can also be applied to dry lips. See more
